mapper.sql: training_book_manage_idx, homepage_id, training_idx, student_idx, student_name, web_id, student_birth, belong_name, applicant_cell_phone, student_rank, qr_count, training_status, training_type, training_date, TO_CHAR(add_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS add_date, add_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRAINING_BOOK_MANAGE ( training_book_manage_idx, homepage_id, training_idx, student_idx, student_name, web_id, belong_name, student_birth, applicant_cell_phone, student_rank, qr_count, training_status, training_type, training_date, add_date, add_id ) SELECT TRAINING_BOOK_MANAGE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, homepage_id, training_idx, student_idx, student_name, CASE WHEN ts.apply_type = 'CMS' THEN ts.member_id ELSE ts.web_id END AS web_id, CASE WHEN ts.apply_type = 'CMS' THEN ts.student_organization ELSE ts.belong_name END AS belong_name, student_birth, applicant_cell_phone, student_rank, #{qr_count}, '1', #{training_type}, #{training_date}, SYSDATE, #{add_id} FROM TRAINING_STUDENT ts WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND training_idx = #{training_idx} AND apply_status in ('1', '2', '5') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT tbm.web_id FROM TRAINING_BOOK_MANAGE tbm WHERE tbm.web_id = CASE WHEN ts.apply_type = 'CMS' THEN ts.member_id ELSE ts.web_id END AND tbm.training_idx = ts.training_idx AND tbm.homepage_id = ts.homepage_id AND tbm.qr_count = #{qr_count} AND TRUNC(tbm.add_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAINING_BOOK_MANAGE WHERE training_idx = #{training_idx} AND qr_count = #{qr_count} AND TRUNC(add_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE TRAINING_BOOK_MANAGE SET training_type = #{training_type}, training_status = #{training_status}, training_date = SYSDATE WHERE training_idx = #{training_idx} AND web_id = #{web_id} AND qr_count = #{qr_count} AND TRUNC(add_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM TRAINING_BOOK_MANAGE WHERE training_idx = #{training_idx} ORDER BY student_name, qr_count, training_date desc
